jd_analysis_result.summary: We are seeking dedicated and compassionate Registered Nurses to join our healthcare team in Frenchs Forest NSW. As a Registered Nurse, you will provide high-quality, person-centred care to residents in aged care facilities, ensuring their dignity, safety, and wellbeing.

skill_evidence.aged care: provide high-quality, person-centred care to residents in aged care facilities
skill_evidence.leadership: Excellent communication, clinical, and leadership skills

skill_evidence.medication administration: Conduct assessments, administer medications, and manage care plans
skill_evidence.aged care quality standards: Knowledge of Aged Care Quality Standards and accreditation requirements

responsibilities: Deliver safe, evidence-based nursing care to aged care residents
Conduct assessments, administer medications, and manage care plans
Supervise and support Enrolled Nurses (ENs) and Personal Care Assistants (PCAs)
Maintain accurate clinical documentation and support compliance with Aged Care Quality Standards
Liaise with residents, families, and multidisciplinary teams to ensure holistic care
